videos.title: My Thoughts On Generative AI
videos.description:
NEW COURSES: http://bradsartschool.com
Need more artist pep talks, check out @Adam_Duff_LUCIDPIXUL 

I used to make videos about Gen AI on a pretty regular basis. But as more and more people have come around to the line of thinking many artists have had since the beginning I saw less need to. But I have been feeling the need to put all my thoughts down in one video to point people to when they ask. So buckle up, it's a long one.

-----------------------------------------------------

videos.title: The Best Way to Set up a Headless Mac Using Worbench
videos.description:
NEW COURSES: http://bradsartschool.com CODE: monitormonth
HDMI Dummy Plug https://amzn.to/4u8qtNz (affiliate link)

This is Workbench by Astropad. There are a lot of remote desktop apps for the iPad that let you stream your mac desktop locally and some work online. Some require a dongle. But this is a headless over the internet solution that works surprisingly well.

videos.title: The Cheapest Drawing Tablet That I Recommend - XP Pen Deco 1 v3
videos.description:
NEW COURSES: http://bradsartschool.com
XP Pen Deco 1 v3 https://amzn.to/3QxKdLZ (affiliate link)
Want the Best? Wacom Intuos Pro: https://amzn.to/49kiHb3 (affiliate link)

When it comes to drawing tablets without screens you can save a lot of money. But some of the lowest price options out there have a really small drawing area. This has a nice big drawing area with a good price tag.
